design_philosophy: A modern, editorial, and highly credible political campaign website. Prioritizes clear typography, asymmetric 'bento' layouts, and a single dominant CTA. Avoids standard templates by using stark contrast and refined typography to build trust and authority.

headings.weight_strategy: Radical contrast: Black (800/900) for hero/main headings, Medium (500) for cards.
headings.transform: uppercase for sub-labels and overlines with tracking-[0.2em]

spacing_and_layout.container: Use max-w-7xl mx-auto for main constraints, but allow hero images to break out (bleed).
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. Use py-20 or py-32 for section vertical padding.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento-style modular grid. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with varied spans (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4) to create asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton in data/timeline areas. Use border-b border-[#0A1128]/10 to separate items.

buttons.primary: bg-[#EA580C] text-white hover:bg-[#C2410C] rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0A1128] border border-[#0A1128] hover:bg-[#0A1128] hover:text-white rounded-sm px-8 py-3 transition-all

components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-border), no shadows by default. Hover adds shadow-lg and slight lift.
components.forms: Shadcn standard but customized: square/sharp corners, 1px border, focus:ring-[#0A1128].
components.navigation: Sticky, crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80). 1px border-b border-[#0A1128]/10.

animations.scroll: Use framer-motion for smooth, staggered upward fade-ins (y: 20, opacity: 0 to y: 0, opacity: 1).
animations.interactive: Buttons should have slight scale effect (scale: 0.98 on tap).

pages_and_sections.name: Header Navigation
pages_and_sections.components: Logo (Kumaran), Links (Journey, Vision, AGR Trust, Media), CTA (Donate, Volunteer)

pages_and_sections.name: Hero Section
pages_and_sections.layout: Grid-based. Left: text-6xl+ Headline, subhead, CTA row. Right: 'hero_portrait' inside a sharp-edged container bleeding to the edge.
pages_and_sections.content_hints: Headline: 'A Vision for Tomorrow. Rooted in Today.' CTA: 'Join the Movement'

pages_and_sections.name: About / Journey Timeline
pages_and_sections.layout: Vertical timeline with 1px border lines connecting nodes. Text on one side, small images ('about_portrait') or icons on the other.
pages_and_sections.content_hints: Highlight early life, political entry, and major milestones.

pages_and_sections.name: Vision & Manifesto
pages_and_sections.layout: Bento Grid (Control Room style). 3 to 4 key pillars (e.g., Education, Economy, Infrastructure).
pages_and_sections.notes: Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for an inspirational quote block here.

pages_and_sections.name: AGR NGO Trust Section
pages_and_sections.layout: Background changes to #FDFBF7. Features impact numbers (Counter components) and a masonry image gallery using 'ngo_children_1', 'ngo_children_2', and 'ngo_event'.
pages_and_sections.content_hints: Focus on ground-level social work. 'Transforming lives through AGR Trust'.

pages_and_sections.name: Get Involved (Forms)
pages_and_sections.layout: Two-column grid. Left: Volunteer Signup. Right: Contact. Uses Shadcn form elements.
pages_and_sections.notes: Ensure forms have solid, accessible focus states and submit buttons.

pages_and_sections.name: Footer
pages_and_sections.layout: Massive typography 'KUMARAN' (text-[10vw]). Dark background (#0A1128) with white text. Social icons (Lucide).

technical_requirements.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute.
technical_requirements.motion: Wrap grid items in framer-motion components where appropriate, keeping HTML direct child rules in mind.
